title: Castaway and Ronin - total conversion mods of Mork Borg (solo RPG)
body:
In this episode, Daniel explores two total conversion mods for Mörk Borg: Ronin and Castaway. Both offer exciting new ways to play in the grim world of Mörk Borg while adding unique themes. Castaway focuses on survival mechanics, placing characters on a deserted island where they must combat hunger, thirst, and other afflictions, all while trying to craft an escape plan. Daniel highlights the innovative solo rules in Castaway, particularly praising the clever decision-making framework.

Ronin, inspired by samurai and Japanese folklore, allows players to take on the role of ronin or warriors in a world of honor, duels, and mystical powers. Daniel discusses the honor system, which influences character progression and outcomes in death, making each decision impactful. While Ronin has a sleek design and an engaging theme, Daniel notes some challenges with the small, hard-to-read text.

Both mods enrich the Mörk Borg experience, with Castaway offering survival challenges and Ronin delivering intense, honor-driven combat and storytelling. If you’re a fan of Mörk Borg or looking for new ways to play, these mods are well worth exploring!
